---
name: refresh-serena-context
agent: ask
description: Refresh Serena memory and migration context after a completed architecture or UI milestone.
argument-hint: "[what changed]"
---
Use **xuanwu-skill** first.

Review the completed work and update Serena context with:
- architecture facts that are now true
- reusable UI or module patterns that future work must follow
- gaps that remain in the VSA -> MDDD migration
- whether xuanwu-skill or other project indexes should be refreshed because project structure changed significantly
